episodes.episode_title: It's Such an Interesting World
I Love Pretty Things
Looking Forward to Things Is Half the Pleasure of Them
One Can’t Stay Sad Very Long in Such an Interesting World
Let us Look on the Bright Side of Things
I Thought Nothing Could Be as Bad as Red Hair
I've Been Making Mistakes, but Each Mistake Has Helped to Cure Me of My Shortcomings
I Don't Want to Be Anyone but Myself
Next to Trying and Winning, the Best Thing Is Trying and Failing
I Don't Know What Lies Around the Bend, but I'm Going to Believe That the Best Does
I'd Like to Add Some Beauty to Life
Perhaps We Always Love Best the People Who Need Us
When I Think Something Nice Is Going to Happen, I Seem to Fly Right Up On the Wings of Anticipation
It Is Never Too Late for the Real Prince to Come for the True Princess
I'll Come From the Ends of the Earth If Necessary
It's Nicer Not to Know
Love is the Power That Transforms Everything
I Feel as if I Had Opened a Book and Found Roses of Yesterday, Sweet and Beloved, Between Its Leaves
I'll Walk the Path to Heaven from Here and Now
My World Has Fallen Apart
Has the Real Prince Come at Last...?
How Horrible it is That People Have to Grow Up, and Marry, and Change!
I Have Learned to Look upon Each Little Hindrance as a Jest and Each Great One as the Foreshadowing of Victory
It’s the Birthday of Our Happiness
